root_cause: Kubelet is not responding on node
evidence: Ready condition reason indicates kubelet status loss: NodeStatusUnknown
Pod is assigned to node node1
Timeline contains node-controller or status signal that kubelet stopped reporting

causes.message: Node Ready condition degraded with reason NodeStatusUnknown
Kubelet stopped reporting node status to the control plane
Workload is affected because the node agent is no longer responding

pod:worker-api-pod: Pod is affected by kubelet heartbeat/status loss on its node

likely_causes: Kubelet process is hung, stopped, or crashing
Node cannot reach the API server to renew heartbeats or leases
Node is overloaded enough that kubelet health reporting is failing
Underlying host or VM networking is degraded
suggested_checks: Check kubelet service health and logs on the node
Inspect node heartbeat and lease renewal behavior
